planned_maneuvers.note: Starlink altitude migration from ~550km to ~480km is a planned operational maneuver, not a storm-induced loss. TLE dropouts from this migration are excluded per Consortium framing (Comm.10, prediction 16).

note: Preliminary scoring. Final score requires full TLE differential analysis comparing Feb 18 baseline to May 31 snapshot, with manual separation of planned vs unplanned losses.
